languages.text: Изменник должен скрываться среди приближенных Себериана, чтобы иметь ценность для Инквизитора.

traits.locale_text: Изменник должен скрываться среди приближенных Себериана, чтобы иметь ценность для Инквизитора.

languages.text: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.
languages.original_text: Изменник должен скрываться среди приближенных Себериана, чтобы иметь ценность для Инквизитора.

traits.locale_text: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.

languages.text: Der Abtrünnige muss zu Seberians innerstem Kreis zählen, da er andernfalls keinen Wert für den Inquisitor hätte.
languages.original_text: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.

traits.locale_text: Der Abtrünnige muss zu Seberians innerstem Kreis zählen, da er andernfalls keinen Wert für den Inquisitor hätte.

languages.text: La taupe doit se cacher dans l'entourage intime de Seberian, sans quoi elle n'aurait que peu de valeur aux yeux de l'Inquisition.
languages.original_text: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.

traits.locale_text: La taupe doit se cacher dans l'entourage intime de Seberian, sans quoi elle n'aurait que peu de valeur aux yeux de l'Inquisition.

languages.text: 这个叛徒必定藏在塞贝里安的核心圈子里，否则对审判官来说价值不大。
languages.original_text: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.

traits.locale_text: 这个叛徒必定藏在塞贝里安的核心圈子里，否则对审判官来说价值不大。

languages.text: El traidor debe ocultarse en el círculo interior de Seberian, pues de lo contrario no sería de ningún valor para el inquisidor.
languages.original_text: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.

traits.locale_text: El traidor debe ocultarse en el círculo interior de Seberian, pues de lo contrario no sería de ningún valor para el inquisidor.

languages.text: 裏切り者はセベリアンの取り巻きの中に隠れなければならない。
languages.original_text: A traitor must hide among Seberian's cronies — only then is he of value to the Inquisitor.

languages.text: Dönek, Seberian'ın yakın çevresinde saklanıyor olmalı. Aksi hâlde Engizisyoncu için pek bir değeri olmazdı.
languages.original_text: The turncoat must be hidden among Seberian's inner circle, else they would hold little value to the Inquisitor.

traits.locale_text: Dönek, Seberian'ın yakın çevresinde saklanıyor olmalı. Aksi hâlde Engizisyoncu için pek bir değeri olmazdı.
